item: Add one-command agentic bootstrap that emits AGENTS.md, REVIEW.md, docs contract, PR template, validation commands, and evidence receipt docs.

item: Create an agent-instruction linter for AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, REVIEW.md, Cursor/Windsurf/Continue rules.

source_examples: agents-lint; Claude Code docs; Cursor rules

item: Scan agent prompt/config files for hidden Unicode, secrets, wildcard permissions, and unsafe tool/network guidance.

delivery_shape: Static checks with SARIF/JSON output.
completion_note: lint_agent_docs.py now detects hidden Unicode, likely secrets, wildcard/unrestricted permissions, unsafe destructive command guidance, unsafe browser/account guidance, and supports text/JSON/SARIF output.

item: Add rule length, provenance, and failure-linked-rule format checks.

completion_note: lint_agent_docs.py now warns on overlong instruction files/lines and rule-like bullets that lack local context/provenance language.

completion_note: repo-contract-kit now installs an untrusted-pr permission profile, validates review-runner trust profiles, and ships an optional .github/workflows/agent-review-readonly.yml adapter with read-only permissions and persist-credentials disabled.

item: Compress the primary operator workflow into a five-command happy path.
why: The command map is safe but broad; humans should see status, orient, task, verify, and update before advanced diagnostics, ledgers, readiness, and sidecar commands.
source_examples: Harness critique 2026-06-24; AGW-107 command-map; AGW-109 grouped help/status; AGW-115 palette
delivery_shape: Help, guide, and docs updates that make the primary path explicit, demote advanced commands into diagnostics/automation/maintainer lanes, and add tests for grouped help and command metadata stability.

item: Add a local harness outcome calibration report.
why: The harness has many gates but needs proof that they reduce stale starts, scope drift, missing docs, and human review burden instead of only adding process.
source_examples: AGW-048 receipt metrics; AGW-097 state ledger; harness critique 2026-06-24
delivery_shape: Read-only report that aggregates local receipts and task metadata into time-to-orient, commands-to-green, stale-start prevention, packet escalation reasons, skipped checks, false-positive disposition, and human-burden fields.
completion_note: repo-contract-kit 0.6.25 adds read-only kit calibration --json with explicit time_to_orient, commands_to_green, stale_start_prevention, packet_escalation_reasons, skipped_checks, false_positive_disposition, human_burden, receipt, task, and run evidence fields.

item: Define sidecar and receipt retention, privacy, and purge policy.
why: Sidecar receipts and local ledgers are useful evidence, but v1 needs an explicit lifecycle so private repo context is retained, shared, and cleaned deliberately.
source_examples: AGW-076 sidecar state; AGW-119 feedback ledger; AGW-097 state ledger; harness critique 2026-06-24
delivery_shape: Policy docs plus CLI/status support for retention windows, privacy labels, purge previews, safe archive guidance, and hosted-model sharing warnings; no deletion by default.
completion_note: repo-contract-kit 0.6.25 adds docs/sidecar-retention.md, templates/common/sidecar-retention.md, and read-only kit retention --json with 90-day retention windows, privacy labels, purge preview, archive guidance, hosted-model warning, and no deletion by default.

item: Complete the legacy Codex_CodeReview archive switch after v1 migration proof.
why: The one-product story is correct, but normal reviews still pay a two-repo tax until the old source checkout is explicitly frozen or redirected after migration evidence is current.
source_examples: AGW-100 public kit surface; AGW-127 v1 consolidation; docs/version-1-consolidation.md
delivery_shape: Archive/read-only closeout that updates old repo notices, verifies target migration and customized-update receipts, records rollback guidance, and stops normal source work from starting in Codex_CodeReview.
completion_note: repo-contract-kit 0.6.25 adds the version 1 archive-switch checklist and updates stack docs; Codex_CodeReview README now redirects normal workflow-source and install-layer work to repo-contract-kit while preserving this checkout for history, backlog closeout, migration diffs, and archive validation.

item: Add a deterministic harness mode selector for lite standard and release-gated work.
why: Agents should not guess which harness mode to use; kit should inspect task source, changed paths, risk triggers, docs impact, release surfaces, dirty state, and active work, then select the strictest applicable mode with explicit reasons.
source_examples: User question 2026-06-24; AGW-132 lite mode contract; AGW-134 mode-aware task packets; AGW-130 task-start freshness; AGW-107 command-map
delivery_shape: `kit mode-check --json` or `kit orient --mode auto` plus task-packet integration that reports selected_mode, trigger reasons, allowed downgrades, forced escalations, and next commands; include fixtures for lite, standard, release-gated, and human-forced-stricter cases.
completion_note: repo-contract-kit 0.6.25 adds kit mode-check --json with selected_mode, requested_mode, trigger evidence, downgrade blockers, allowed stricter choices, forced release-gated escalation for public contract paths, and next commands; task-packet and verify include mode_selection.
